name: Scunners Run
short_description: A fast, twin-stick shooter micro-roguelike with bullet hell elements, chunky weapons and satisfying destruction. Your AI friend AL4-N will help you along the way with new weapons, upgrades and vague moral support, as you attempt to beat the Scunners Run.
detailed_description:
NOW AVAILABLE FOR MAC!

Take on the galaxy spanning Bloc in a run of tight, chunky twin-stick shooting. Only your weapons, a bunch of upgrades and your wits, will take you through the gauntlet of the Scunners Run.

Chunky, physical combat
Enemies and obstacles drift and collide, railguns beams reflect, EMP bursts disable shields and engines, weapons have secondary effects that can hurt you as much as the enemy. Discover the mini combat-sandbox and see how you can twist it for your own gain.

Customise your run
Fast, twitchy shooting against a variety of enemies that can kill you quickly. Go for more defensive upgrades if you struggle to stay alive, or load up on aggressive ones to let offence be your defence.

See how far you can get
The difficulty ramps up fast, so be prepared to die. See how far your run takes you. Did you unlock anything? Did you reach the boss...



Loosely based on the 2017 Glasgow Global Game Jam Winner "Spacewaves 2079".
